name: Battery Discharge Rate Calculator
description: Calculate the actual discharge rate (C-rating) of your battery based on current draw.
formulaDescription: The discharge rate is the ratio of current draw in Amps to the battery capacity in Amp-hours.

example.explanation: With 65A draw on a 1.3Ah battery, the discharge is 50C. Since the battery is rated for 75C, it is safe with a 25C margin.

faqs.question: What happens if I exceed the C-rating?
faqs.answer: Exceeding the C-rating causes excessive heat, which can damage the battery, lead to 'puffing', or in extreme cases, cause a fire.

faqs.question: Are manufacturer C-ratings always accurate?
faqs.answer: Many manufacturers inflate their C-ratings. It is best practice to stay within 60-70% of the labeled C-rating for longevity.

concept: C-rating represents how fast a battery can be discharged relative to its maximum capacity without damage.
guideSteps: Enter the maximum current your drone draws at full throttle (in Amps).
Enter your battery capacity in mAh.
Enter the C-rating printed on your battery label.
The calculator will determine if your battery can handle the load.
